name: General document structures across unrelated domains

chunks.text:
# Learning Objectives
Students will compare evaporation and condensation. Exercise: explain how the processes differ.

# Installation Procedure
Before installation, close the water supply. Step 1: attach the filter housing to the bracket.

# Spaced Recall Outcomes
Methods used two participant groups. Results showed that spaced recall increased retention after one week.

# Service Agreement
The supplier shall retain audit records for five years. The agreement has an effective date of July 1.

# Community Garden
The community garden combines shared planting plots with weekly planning meetings.
